messages.content: <@&1067465541184389121> An explanation for the trade i took here for you guys to see. At first, i saw that candle i drew an arrow on.. Large wick down, smaller body and small wick up. The bottom of the wick was 1.52, and the top 1.58 (of wick) hence why i sent out the alert to watch for that zone before it dipped. If you look at the volume, it’s very high, higher than all previous candles, combined with the wick, this makes it a seller exhaustion VSA which indicates a strong buy zone. Therefore, the entry was marked out in that zone. Combine this with the times n sales where you see large shares loading, you have a good entry on your hand ✅ Don’t forget to focus on tickers with news to not get dumped on, and watch for the float, since a high float would need very large volume. I hope this explains it well on text. Large wick down, small or no wick up, smaller body, and large volume ✅ Both times it tested the 1.58, it held, which can be seen on the chart right where we entered. That indicates an upside reversal which we got 🙌🏻 Congrats to everyone who banked
